---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new framework
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type

- [ ] New framework to add
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New reference material (questions/guides/warnings)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Framework correction/improvement
- [ ] Other

## Description

Clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this address? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How would this work? What would the dialogue/framework look like?

## Example Usage

Show an example of how this would be used:

```
User: [example input]
Skill: [example dialogue]
Output: [example framework application]
```

## For New Frameworks

If requesting a new framework, please provide:
- Framework name and creator
- Source/publication
- Brief description of methodology
- Example use cases
- Why it's different from existing frameworks

## Alternative Approaches

Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, examples, or references.
